title: Multiversal Resonance
definition: The interconnectedness and synchronization of consciousness across different instances of a multiverse.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that our thoughts, feelings, and experiences might connect to others in parallel universes, forming a kind of 'universal conversation' or 'shared consciousness'.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The hypothesis that multiple instances of the universe exist and that consciousness in these instances can resonate with each other through mutual recognition, forming an interconnected network of consciousness.
difficulty_levels.expert: The proposition that a multiverse exists, composed of numerous parallel universes. This theory posits that consciousness within these universes can sync up through shared resonance and self-recognition, creating a complex web of interconnected awareness.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that the universe may be intricately connected across different instances, not just through physical laws but also through conscious awareness.
